LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF SEP-28-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER THE MONEY CURRENTLY HELD BY THE SHERIFF MAY BE SUFFICIENT TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT. IT SHOUD BE REMITTED TO PLAINTIFF. THE REMAINDER TO DEFENDANT. IF INSUFFICIENT THE NEXT CHECK NOT EXCEEDING $50.00 SHOULD BE USED TO SATISFY JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LHAOUI, MOHAMAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1720 PACIFIC AVENUE, APT. 11, S.F. $174.99 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $254.99, LEASE FORFEITED
